chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1943 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A. No.8829/2012 2. For orders as to non-prosecution of M.A. No.5539/2019 as notices not issued as costs and copies not supplied. 3. For hearing of main case 03.03.2021 Syed Sardar Hussain Shah advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he has been instructed by the petitioner that the impugned order has been complied by the petitioner. He has filed a statement dated 03.03.2021, which is taken on record. In view of the above, the petition and listed applications stand disposed of as having become infructuous with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E Ali Haider
